name: fanpulse-ai
description: GenAI-Powered Stadium Operations & Fan Experience Platform for FIFA World Cup 2026

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared-types && npm run build --workspace=apps/server && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared-types && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=apps/server && npm run test --workspace=apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/server && npm run lint --workspace=apps/web
